note: LG이노텍 PoC tenant 카탈로그 — 신규 팹·라인 증설·클린룸 시공·대형 설비 반입(rigging)·특수가스/케미컬 라인 시공·MEP 시공 특화. 광학솔루션/패키지솔루션(FC-BGA, 포토마스크)/모빌리티솔루션 양산 라인 인프라 신축·증설 현장 가정. 일반 토목/주거 건설 콘텐츠 제외. regulation 인용은 산업안전보건기준규칙 우선이며 felix 검수 필요.

CLEANROOM_FITOUT.label_th: การติดตั้งห้องคลีนรูม

baseline.content: FFU(Fan Filter Unit) 및 천정 그리드 설치 — 고소작업 안전대 체결 및 사다리/MEWP 사용 확인
baseline.content_en: FFU (Fan Filter Unit) and ceiling grid installation — verify harness use and approved ladder/MEWP
baseline.content_vi: Lắp FFU và lưới trần — kiểm tra dây an toàn và thang/MEWP được phê duyệt
baseline.content_th: ติดตั้ง FFU และ ceiling grid — ตรวจสอบการคล้องเข็มขัดนิรภัยและบันได/MEWP ที่ได้รับอนุมัติ
baseline.content_id: Pemasangan FFU dan grid plafon — verifikasi penggunaan harness dan tangga/MEWP yang disetujui

scenarios.content: FFU(20~25kg) 양중 중 천정 그리드에서 추락 또는 FFU 낙하
scenarios.content_en: Worker falls from ceiling grid or FFU (20–25kg) drops during lifting
scenarios.content_vi: Công nhân ngã từ lưới trần hoặc FFU (20–25kg) rơi khi nâng
scenarios.content_th: ผู้ปฏิบัติงานตกจาก ceiling grid หรือ FFU (20–25 กก.) ตกระหว่างยก
scenarios.content_id: Pekerja jatuh dari grid plafon atau FFU (20–25kg) terjatuh saat diangkat

scenarios.content: 임시 가설 사다리·발판이 raised floor 미설치 구간에서 전도
scenarios.content_en: Temporary ladder/platform tips over on area without raised floor
scenarios.content_vi: Thang/sàn tạm bị lật ở khu vực chưa lắp raised floor
scenarios.content_th: บันได/แท่นชั่วคราวล้มในบริเวณที่ยังไม่ติดตั้ง raised floor
scenarios.content_id: Tangga/platform sementara terjatuh di area tanpa raised floor

mitigations.content: MEWP(고소작업대) 사용 우선, 사다리 사용 시 2인 1조 + 양손 자유 확보
mitigations.content_en: Use MEWP as primary access; if ladder used, 2-person buddy + both hands free
mitigations.content_vi: Ưu tiên MEWP; nếu dùng thang phải đi 2 người + 2 tay rảnh
mitigations.content_th: ใช้ MEWP เป็นหลัก หากใช้บันไดต้องไปเป็นคู่ 2 คน + ปลดมือทั้งสองข้าง
mitigations.content_id: Gunakan MEWP sebagai prioritas; jika tangga, 2 orang + kedua tangan bebas

mitigations.content: FFU 양중 시 인양 보조구(strap/jig) 사용 및 하부 출입통제 라인 설정
mitigations.content_en: Use lifting strap/jig for FFU hoisting and set drop zone exclusion below
mitigations.content_vi: Dùng dây/jig nâng FFU và lập vùng cấm bên dưới
mitigations.content_th: ใช้ strap/jig ยก FFU และตั้ง drop zone ด้านล่าง
mitigations.content_id: Gunakan strap/jig untuk mengangkat FFU dan tetapkan zona larangan di bawah

ppe.content: 전신 안전대 + 클린룸 부직포 작업복 + 안전화(클린타입)
ppe.content_en: Full-body harness + cleanroom coverall + cleanroom-rated safety shoes
ppe.content_vi: Dây an toàn toàn thân + áo liền quần phòng sạch + giày bảo hộ loại phòng sạch
ppe.content_th: เข็มขัดนิรภัยเต็มตัว + ชุดคลีนรูม + รองเท้านิรภัยแบบคลีนรูม
ppe.content_id: Full body harness + coverall cleanroom + sepatu safety tipe cleanroom

baseline.content: 에폭시 도장·시너 사용 시 환기 확보 및 화기 격리 (클린룸 밀폐공간 작업)
baseline.content_en: Epoxy coating/thinner work — ensure ventilation and ignition isolation (cleanroom confined work)
baseline.content_vi: Sơn epoxy/thinner — đảm bảo thông gió và cách ly nguồn lửa (làm việc trong không gian kín phòng sạch)
baseline.content_th: งานทาสีอีพ็อกซี/ทินเนอร์ — รับรองการระบายอากาศและแยกแหล่งจุดไฟ (งานในพื้นที่จำกัดคลีนรูม)
baseline.content_id: Pekerjaan epoxy/thinner — pastikan ventilasi dan isolasi sumber api (kerja ruang terbatas cleanroom)

scenarios.content: 환기 미가동 상태에서 시너 증기 축적 → 인화·중독
scenarios.content_en: Thinner vapor accumulates without ventilation → ignition/intoxication
scenarios.content_vi: Hơi thinner tích tụ khi không thông gió → cháy/ngộ độc
scenarios.content_th: ไอทินเนอร์สะสมโดยไม่ระบายอากาศ → ติดไฟ/พิษ
scenarios.content_id: Uap thinner menumpuk tanpa ventilasi → terbakar/keracunan

mitigations.content: 작업 전 산소·VOC 농도 측정(LEL 10% 미만), 임시 송배기 팬 가동, 화기작업 허가서 발급
mitigations.content_en: Pre-work O2/VOC measurement (LEL <10%), temporary supply/exhaust fan on, hot work permit issued
mitigations.content_vi: Đo O2/VOC trước (LEL <10%), bật quạt cấp/hút tạm, cấp giấy phép làm việc nóng
mitigations.content_th: วัด O2/VOC ก่อน (LEL <10%) เปิดพัดลมจ่าย/ดูดชั่วคราว ออกใบอนุญาตงานร้อน
mitigations.content_id: Ukur O2/VOC sebelum kerja (LEL <10%), fan supply/exhaust sementara nyala, terbitkan hot work permit

ppe.content_en: Organic-vapor respirator (Type A) + nitrile chemical gloves + safety goggles
ppe.content_vi: Mặt nạ phòng độc hữu cơ (Loại A) + găng nitrile + kính bảo hộ
ppe.content_th: หน้ากากกันไอระเหยอินทรีย์ (Type A) + ถุงมือไนไตรล์ + แว่นตานิรภัย
ppe.content_id: Respirator uap organik (Type A) + sarung tangan nitril + kacamata safety

baseline.content: 인접 가동 라인과의 분리(파티션·임시벽·차폐막) 및 분진·소음 격리 확인
baseline.content_en: Separation from adjacent live line (partition/temp wall/shield) and dust/noise isolation verified
baseline.content_vi: Cách ly với dây chuyền đang vận hành liền kề (vách/ tường tạm/ màn chắn) và cách ly bụi/ồn
baseline.content_th: การแยกจากไลน์ที่ทำงานอยู่ติดกัน (พาร์ทิชัน/ผนังชั่วคราว/ฉากกั้น) และการแยกฝุ่น/เสียง
baseline.content_id: Pemisahan dari line aktif berdekatan (partisi/dinding sementara/penutup) dan isolasi debu/kebisingan
baseline.regulation: 산업안전보건기준규칙 제3편 제2장(건설공사), KOSHA GUIDE C-104(건축물 증·개축)

scenarios.content: 차폐 미흡으로 시공 분진이 가동 중인 클린룸 라인에 유입 → 양산 수율 손실
scenarios.content_en: Construction dust enters live cleanroom line due to weak barrier → production yield loss
scenarios.content_vi: Bụi thi công lọt vào dây chuyền phòng sạch đang chạy → giảm yield sản xuất
scenarios.content_th: ฝุ่นก่อสร้างเข้าไปในไลน์คลีนรูมที่ทำงานอยู่ → สูญเสีย yield การผลิต
scenarios.content_id: Debu konstruksi masuk ke line cleanroom aktif → kerugian yield produksi

mitigations.content: 임시 격벽(스터드+드라이월+비닐) 이중 + 음압 유지 + 출입구 에어샤워 임시 설치, 발주처(LG이노텍 EHS) 사전 승인
mitigations.content_en: Double temporary partition (stud+drywall+vinyl) + negative pressure + temporary air shower at access; pre-approval from LG Innotek EHS
mitigations.content_vi: Vách ngăn tạm 2 lớp (stud+drywall+vinyl) + áp suất âm + air shower tạm tại lối vào; LG Innotek EHS phê duyệt trước
mitigations.content_th: พาร์ทิชันชั่วคราวสองชั้น (stud+drywall+ไวนิล) + แรงดันลบ + air shower ชั่วคราวที่ทางเข้า รับอนุมัติจาก LG Innotek EHS ล่วงหน้า
mitigations.content_id: Partisi sementara dua lapis (stud+drywall+vinyl) + tekanan negatif + air shower sementara di akses; persetujuan awal dari LG Innotek EHS

ppe.content: 방진마스크(KF94 이상) + 클린룸 부직포 작업복 + 안전화
ppe.content_en: Dust mask (KF94+) + cleanroom coverall + safety shoes
ppe.content_vi: Khẩu trang chống bụi (KF94+) + áo liền quần phòng sạch + giày bảo hộ
ppe.content_th: หน้ากากกันฝุ่น (KF94+) + ชุดคลีนรูม + รองเท้านิรภัย
ppe.content_id: Masker debu (KF94+) + coverall cleanroom + sepatu safety

baseline.content: Raised floor(액세스 플로어) 시공 — 개구부 추락방지 및 패널 적재 안정성
baseline.content_en: Raised floor installation — opening fall protection and panel stacking stability
baseline.content_vi: Lắp raised floor — chống rơi tại lỗ mở và ổn định khi xếp panel
baseline.content_th: ติดตั้ง raised floor — ป้องกันตกที่ช่องเปิดและความมั่นคงในการวางแผง
baseline.content_id: Pemasangan raised floor — proteksi jatuh lubang dan stabilitas tumpukan panel

scenarios.content: raised floor 패널 미설치 개구부(400×400mm 이상)에 작업자 발 빠짐
scenarios.content_en: Worker's foot falls into opening (>400×400mm) where raised floor panel not yet placed
scenarios.content_vi: Chân công nhân lọt vào lỗ mở (>400×400mm) chưa lắp panel raised floor
scenarios.content_th: เท้าผู้ปฏิบัติงานตกลงในช่องเปิด (>400×400 มม.) ที่ยังไม่ได้ติดตั้ง panel
scenarios.content_id: Kaki pekerja jatuh ke lubang (>400×400mm) yang belum dipasang panel

mitigations.content: 미시공 개구부에 안전판 또는 형광 테이프 표시, 시야 확보 조명 설치, 1일 종료 시 패널 복원
mitigations.content_en: Cover unfinished openings with hard cover or hi-vis tape, ensure lighting, restore panels at end of shift
mitigations.content_vi: Che lỗ mở chưa hoàn thiện bằng tấm cứng hoặc băng phản quang, đảm bảo chiếu sáng, phục hồi panel cuối ca
mitigations.content_th: ปิดช่องเปิดที่ยังไม่เสร็จด้วยแผ่นแข็งหรือเทปสะท้อนแสง จัดแสงสว่าง คืนแผง panel เมื่อสิ้นกะ
mitigations.content_id: Tutup lubang yang belum selesai dengan penutup keras atau pita reflektif, pastikan pencahayaan, kembalikan panel di akhir shift

ppe.content_en: Anti-slip safety shoes + knee pads + cleanroom gloves
ppe.content_vi: Giày bảo hộ chống trượt + đệm đầu gối + găng phòng sạch
ppe.content_th: รองเท้านิรภัยกันลื่น + สนับเข่า + ถุงมือคลีนรูม
ppe.content_id: Sepatu safety anti-slip + pelindung lutut + sarung tangan cleanroom

EQUIPMENT_RIGGING_INSTALL.label_vi: Vận chuyển và lắp đặt thiết bị lớn (Rigging)
EQUIPMENT_RIGGING_INSTALL.label_th: การขนย้ายและติดตั้งเครื่องจักรขนาดใหญ่ (Rigging)

baseline.content: 노광·에칭·도금·검사 장비 반입 경로(rigging path) 사전 답사 및 하중 검토
baseline.content_en: Pre-survey of rigging path and floor-load review for lithography/etch/plating/inspection tools
baseline.content_vi: Khảo sát trước đường rigging và xem xét tải sàn cho máy lithography/etch/mạ/kiểm tra
baseline.content_th: สำรวจเส้นทาง rigging และตรวจสอบโหลดพื้นสำหรับเครื่อง lithography/etch/ชุบ/ตรวจสอบ
baseline.content_id: Survei jalur rigging dan tinjauan beban lantai untuk mesin lithography/etch/plating/inspeksi

scenarios.content: 장비 무게(5~30톤) 대비 raised floor 또는 가설 통로 하중 부족 → 함몰
scenarios.content_en: Floor or temp pathway insufficient for tool weight (5–30t) → collapse
scenarios.content_vi: Sàn hoặc lối tạm không đủ tải cho thiết bị (5–30t) → sụp đổ
scenarios.content_th: พื้นหรือทางเดินชั่วคราวรับน้ำหนักเครื่อง (5–30 ตัน) ไม่ได้ → ยุบตัว
scenarios.content_id: Lantai atau jalur sementara tidak cukup untuk beban alat (5–30t) → runtuh

scenarios.content: 장비 반입 중 천정 배관·케이블 트레이와 간섭 → 인입 인프라 손상
scenarios.content_en: Interference with overhead piping/cable tray during move-in → infrastructure damage
scenarios.content_vi: Va chạm với đường ống/khay cáp trên trần khi đưa vào → hỏng hạ tầng
scenarios.content_th: ชนกับท่อ/รางเคเบิลบนเพดานขณะเคลื่อนย้าย → ความเสียหายโครงสร้างพื้นฐาน
scenarios.content_id: Bertabrakan dengan pipa/tray kabel atas saat masuk → kerusakan infrastruktur

mitigations.content: 구조 검토서(structural review)와 rigging plan(3D 클리어런스 포함) 사전 제출·승인, 무거운 장비는 강판 deck 깔고 하중 분산
mitigations.content_en: Submit structural review + rigging plan (3D clearance) for approval; spread load with steel deck for heavy tools
mitigations.content_vi: Nộp báo cáo kết cấu + kế hoạch rigging (clearance 3D) để duyệt; phân tán tải bằng deck thép cho thiết bị nặng
mitigations.content_th: ส่งรายงานโครงสร้าง + แผน rigging (clearance 3D) ขออนุมัติ กระจายโหลดด้วย deck เหล็กสำหรับเครื่องหนัก
mitigations.content_id: Ajukan tinjauan struktur + rigging plan (clearance 3D) untuk persetujuan; sebar beban dengan deck baja untuk alat berat

ppe.content_en: Hard hat (chin strap) + steel-toe boots + hi-vis vest + signaler radio
ppe.content_vi: Mũ cứng (quai cằm) + giày mũi thép + áo phản quang + bộ đàm cho người ra hiệu
ppe.content_th: หมวกนิรภัย (สายรัดคาง) + รองเท้าหัวเหล็ก + เสื้อสะท้อนแสง + วิทยุสำหรับผู้ให้สัญญาณ
ppe.content_id: Helm safety (tali dagu) + sepatu ujung baja + rompi reflektif + radio untuk signalman

baseline.content: 양중 작업 — 신호수 배치 및 인양물 하부 출입통제 라인 설정
baseline.content_en: Lifting operation — assign signaler and set load-zone exclusion line
baseline.content_vi: Công tác nâng — phân công người ra hiệu và lập rào cấm dưới tải
baseline.content_th: งานยก — มอบหมายผู้ให้สัญญาณและตั้งแนวห้ามใต้โหลด
baseline.content_id: Operasi pengangkatan — tugaskan signalman dan tetapkan garis larangan di bawah beban

scenarios.content: 장비(EUV scanner 50톤급) 양중 중 슬링 파단·이탈로 낙하
scenarios.content_en: Sling failure/slip during lifting of heavy tool (EUV scanner class, ~50t) causes drop
scenarios.content_vi: Đứt/tuột sling khi nâng thiết bị nặng (cấp EUV scanner ~50t) gây rơi
scenarios.content_th: Sling ขาด/หลุดขณะยกเครื่องหนัก (ระดับ EUV scanner ~50t) ทำให้ตก
scenarios.content_id: Sling putus/tergelincir saat mengangkat alat berat (kelas EUV scanner ~50t) menyebabkan jatuh

mitigations.content: 정격하중 안전율 5 이상 슬링 사용, 매 양중 전 슬링·후크 외관 점검, 인양물 직하 출입금지 + 신호수 단독 지휘
mitigations.content_en: Slings with safety factor ≥5, pre-lift inspection of sling/hook, no entry under load, single signaler in command
mitigations.content_vi: Sling hệ số an toàn ≥5, kiểm tra sling/móc trước mỗi lần nâng, cấm vào dưới tải, một người ra hiệu chỉ huy
mitigations.content_th: Sling safety factor ≥5 ตรวจ sling/hook ก่อนยกทุกครั้ง ห้ามเข้าใต้โหลด มีผู้ให้สัญญาณคนเดียวควบคุม
mitigations.content_id: Sling safety factor ≥5, inspeksi sling/hook sebelum tiap angkat, larangan masuk di bawah beban, satu signalman komando

mitigations.content: 풍속 10m/s 초과 또는 강우 시 외부 양중 즉시 중단(LG이노텍 EHS 양중 SOP)
mitigations.content_en: Suspend outdoor lifting immediately when wind >10m/s or rain (LG Innotek EHS lifting SOP)
mitigations.content_vi: Ngừng nâng ngoài trời ngay khi gió >10m/s hoặc mưa (LG Innotek EHS lifting SOP)
mitigations.content_th: หยุดยกกลางแจ้งทันทีเมื่อลม >10m/s หรือฝน (LG Innotek EHS lifting SOP)
mitigations.content_id: Hentikan pengangkatan luar segera bila angin >10m/s atau hujan (SOP lifting EHS LG Innotek)

ppe.content_en: Hard hat (chin strap) + steel-toe boots + hi-vis vest + signaler armband
ppe.content_vi: Mũ cứng (quai cằm) + giày mũi thép + áo phản quang + băng tay người ra hiệu
ppe.content_th: หมวกนิรภัย (สายรัดคาง) + รองเท้าหัวเหล็ก + เสื้อสะท้อนแสง + ปลอกแขนผู้ให้สัญญาณ
ppe.content_id: Helm safety (tali dagu) + sepatu ujung baja + rompi reflektif + ban lengan signalman

baseline.content: Anchor 시공 및 정밀 leveling — 진동·소음이 인접 가동 장비에 미치는 영향 최소화
baseline.content_en: Anchor installation and precision leveling — minimize vibration/noise impact on adjacent live tools
baseline.content_vi: Thi công anchor và cân chỉnh tinh — giảm rung/ồn ảnh hưởng thiết bị đang chạy lân cận
baseline.content_th: ติดตั้ง anchor และปรับระดับละเอียด — ลดการสั่น/เสียงที่กระทบเครื่องที่ทำงานอยู่ข้างเคียง
baseline.content_id: Pemasangan anchor dan leveling presisi — minimalkan dampak getaran/kebisingan ke alat aktif berdekatan

scenarios.content: anchor 천공(hammer drill) 진동이 인접 노광기 alignment에 영향 → 생산 손실
scenarios.content_en: Hammer-drill vibration during anchoring disturbs adjacent lithography tool alignment → production loss
scenarios.content_vi: Rung khoan đóng anchor làm sai lệch alignment máy lithography lân cận → tổn thất sản xuất
scenarios.content_th: การสั่นจากการเจาะ anchor รบกวน alignment ของเครื่อง lithography ข้างเคียง → สูญเสียการผลิต
scenarios.content_id: Getaran hammer drill saat anchoring mengganggu alignment alat lithography terdekat → kerugian produksi

mitigations.content: 발주처와 진동 허용치 사전 협의(예: 0.5 mm/s 이하), 가동 라인 비가동 시간대(셧다운 윈도우) 활용, 진동 모니터링 센서 부착
mitigations.content_en: Agree vibration limit with owner (e.g. ≤0.5 mm/s), use shutdown window of live line, attach vibration sensors
mitigations.content_vi: Thỏa thuận giới hạn rung với chủ đầu tư (≤0.5 mm/s), tận dụng cửa sổ shutdown của dây chuyền, gắn cảm biến rung
mitigations.content_th: ตกลงขีดจำกัดการสั่นกับเจ้าของงาน (≤0.5 mm/s) ใช้หน้าต่าง shutdown ของไลน์ที่ทำงานอยู่ ติดเซ็นเซอร์วัดการสั่น
mitigations.content_id: Sepakati batas getaran dengan pemilik (≤0.5 mm/s), gunakan jendela shutdown line aktif, pasang sensor getaran

ppe.content_en: Anti-vibration gloves + hearing protection + safety goggles
ppe.content_vi: Găng chống rung + bảo vệ thính giác + kính bảo hộ
ppe.content_th: ถุงมือกันสั่น + อุปกรณ์ป้องกันการได้ยิน + แว่นตานิรภัย
ppe.content_id: Sarung tangan anti-getar + pelindung pendengaran + kacamata safety

SPECIAL_GAS_PIPING.label_vi: Thi công đường ống khí đặc biệt
SPECIAL_GAS_PIPING.label_th: การติดตั้งท่อก๊าซพิเศษ

baseline.content: 특수가스 배관(SiH4·NH3·Cl2·HBr 등) 용접·오비탈 용접 — 화기작업 허가서 및 N2 purge 절차 준수
baseline.content_en: Specialty gas piping (SiH4/NH3/Cl2/HBr) welding (incl. orbital) — comply with hot work permit and N2 purge
baseline.content_vi: Hàn ống khí đặc biệt (SiH4/NH3/Cl2/HBr, gồm hàn orbital) — tuân thủ giấy phép làm việc nóng và N2 purge
baseline.content_th: เชื่อมท่อก๊าซพิเศษ (SiH4/NH3/Cl2/HBr รวมถึง orbital) — ปฏิบัติตามใบอนุญาตงานร้อนและการ purge N2
baseline.content_id: Pengelasan pipa gas khusus (SiH4/NH3/Cl2/HBr termasuk orbital) — patuhi izin hot work dan N2 purge

scenarios.content: 기존 가스 라인 잔류가스(예: SiH4) 미배기 상태에서 용접 → 자연발화·폭발
scenarios.content_en: Welding on existing gas line without purging residual gas (e.g. SiH4) → pyrophoric ignition/explosion
scenarios.content_vi: Hàn trên đường khí cũ chưa xả khí dư (SiH4) → tự cháy/nổ
scenarios.content_th: เชื่อมท่อก๊าซเก่าที่ยังไม่ purge ก๊าซตกค้าง (เช่น SiH4) → ติดไฟเอง/ระเบิด
scenarios.content_id: Pengelasan pada pipa gas eksisting tanpa purge gas sisa (mis. SiH4) → ignition pyrophoric/ledakan

mitigations.content: 삼중 차단(LOTO) → N2 purge(O2 1% 미만 도달까지) → 가스 검지기 잔류 0ppm 확인 → 용접 시작. 발주처(LG이노텍 FAC) 입회 필수
mitigations.content_en: Triple isolation (LOTO) → N2 purge until O2 <1% → confirm 0 ppm residual on gas detector → start welding. LG Innotek FAC witness required
mitigations.content_vi: Cô lập 3 lớp (LOTO) → N2 purge đến O2 <1% → xác nhận 0 ppm dư trên đầu dò → bắt đầu hàn. Cần đại diện LG Innotek FAC chứng kiến
mitigations.content_th: ตัดแยก 3 ชั้น (LOTO) → N2 purge จนกว่า O2 <1% → ยืนยันก๊าซตกค้าง 0 ppm บนเครื่องตรวจจับ → เริ่มเชื่อม ต้องมี LG Innotek FAC เป็นพยาน
mitigations.content_id: Isolasi tiga lapis (LOTO) → N2 purge sampai O2 <1% → konfirmasi sisa 0 ppm pada detektor → mulai pengelasan. Saksi LG Innotek FAC wajib

mitigations.content: 화재 감시자(fire watcher) 1명 상주, 작업 종료 후 30분 잔류 감시
mitigations.content_en: Dedicated fire watcher present, 30-min post-work monitoring
mitigations.content_vi: Có người canh lửa riêng, theo dõi 30 phút sau khi hoàn tất
mitigations.content_th: มีผู้เฝ้าระวังไฟประจำ ตรวจสอบหลังจบงาน 30 นาที
mitigations.content_id: Pengawas api khusus hadir, pemantauan 30 menit pasca pekerjaan

ppe.content: 용접 방염복(난연) + 용접면 + 가죽 장갑 + 안전화(절연)
ppe.content_en: FR welding jacket + welding hood + leather gloves + dielectric safety shoes
ppe.content_vi: Áo hàn chống cháy + mặt nạ hàn + găng da + giày cách điện
ppe.content_th: เสื้อเชื่อมกันไฟ + หน้ากากเชื่อม + ถุงมือหนัง + รองเท้านิรภัยฉนวน
ppe.content_id: Jaket las FR + topeng las + sarung tangan kulit + sepatu safety dielectric

baseline.content: Leak test(He·N2 가압) — 시험압 단계별 상승 및 인접 인원 격리
baseline.content_en: Leak test (He/N2 pressurization) — stepped pressure rise and personnel exclusion
baseline.content_vi: Kiểm tra rò rỉ (He/N2 nén) — tăng áp theo bậc và cô lập nhân sự
baseline.content_th: Leak test (He/N2 อัดความดัน) — เพิ่มแรงดันเป็นขั้นและกันคนออก
baseline.content_id: Leak test (tekanan He/N2) — kenaikan tekanan bertahap dan isolasi personel

scenarios.content: 급격한 가압으로 fitting 파열 → 비산물에 의한 충돌·청력 손상
scenarios.content_en: Rapid pressurization bursts fitting → flying debris/hearing damage
scenarios.content_vi: Tăng áp đột ngột làm vỡ fitting → mảnh văng/ tổn thương thính giác
scenarios.content_th: การอัดความดันเร็วทำให้ fitting แตก → เศษกระเด็น/ทำลายการได้ยิน
scenarios.content_id: Tekanan cepat memecah fitting → serpihan terbang/kerusakan pendengaran

mitigations.content: 시험압 25%/50%/100% 단계별 가압(각 단계 10분 hold), 시험구역 출입통제 + 안전거리 5m 유지
mitigations.content_en: Stepped pressurize at 25%/50%/100% (10-min hold each), exclusion zone with 5 m standoff
mitigations.content_vi: Tăng áp theo bậc 25%/50%/100% (giữ 10 phút mỗi bậc), khu vực cấm và khoảng cách an toàn 5 m
mitigations.content_th: เพิ่มแรงดันเป็นขั้น 25%/50%/100% (ค้าง 10 นาทีต่อขั้น) เขตห้ามเข้าและระยะปลอดภัย 5 ม.
mitigations.content_id: Tekan bertahap 25%/50%/100% (tahan 10 menit per langkah), zona eksklusi dengan jarak 5 m

ppe.content_en: Side-shield safety goggles + hearing protection + hard hat
ppe.content_vi: Kính bảo hộ có chắn bên + bảo vệ thính giác + mũ cứng
ppe.content_th: แว่นตานิรภัยมีกันด้านข้าง + อุปกรณ์ป้องกันการได้ยิน + หมวกนิรภัย
ppe.content_id: Kacamata safety side shield + pelindung pendengaran + helm safety

baseline.content: 가스 캐비닛 설치 및 환기·검지기 연동 확인
baseline.content_en: Gas cabinet installation and verify ventilation/detector interlock
baseline.content_vi: Lắp tủ khí và kiểm tra liên động thông gió/đầu dò
baseline.content_th: ติดตั้งตู้ก๊าซและตรวจสอบ interlock ระบายอากาศ/ตัวตรวจจับ
baseline.content_id: Instalasi gas cabinet dan verifikasi interlock ventilasi/detektor

scenarios.content: 캐비닛 배기 미연동 상태에서 시운전 가스 주입 → 누출 시 검지·차단 실패
scenarios.content_en: Trial gas charge with cabinet exhaust not interlocked → leak detection/shutoff fails
scenarios.content_vi: Nạp khí thử nghiệm khi hút khí tủ chưa liên động → phát hiện/cắt rò thất bại
scenarios.content_th: ชาร์จก๊าซทดลองโดยที่ระบบดูดอากาศตู้ยังไม่ interlock → ตรวจจับ/ตัดการรั่วล้มเหลว
scenarios.content_id: Pengisian gas uji saat exhaust kabinet belum interlock → deteksi/penutupan kebocoran gagal

mitigations.content: Pre-commissioning checklist 발주처와 합동 — 배기 차압 / 검지기 alarm / EFV(emergency flow valve) / 캐비닛 도어 인터록 4종 동작 검증 후 가스 주입
mitigations.content_en: Joint pre-commissioning with owner — verify exhaust differential, detector alarm, EFV, cabinet door interlock before gas charge
mitigations.content_vi: Pre-commissioning chung với chủ đầu tư — xác nhận chênh áp hút, alarm đầu dò, EFV, interlock cửa tủ trước khi nạp khí
mitigations.content_th: Pre-commissioning ร่วมกับเจ้าของงาน — ตรวจสอบ exhaust differential, alarm detector, EFV, interlock ประตูตู้ ก่อนชาร์จก๊าซ
mitigations.content_id: Pre-commissioning bersama dengan pemilik — verifikasi differential exhaust, alarm detektor, EFV, interlock pintu kabinet sebelum pengisian gas

ppe.content: 전면형 방독마스크(가스 종별 정화통) + 내화학 장갑 + 화학복(Level C)
ppe.content_en: Full-face gas respirator (gas-specific cartridge) + chemical gloves + Level C chemical suit
ppe.content_vi: Mặt nạ phòng độc toàn mặt (theo loại khí) + găng hóa chất + bộ Level C
ppe.content_th: หน้ากากกันก๊าซเต็มหน้า (ตามชนิดก๊าซ) + ถุงมือเคมี + ชุดเคมี Level C
ppe.content_id: Respirator full-face (kartrij sesuai gas) + sarung tangan kimia + setelan kimia Level C

CHEMICAL_LINE_INSTALL.label_vi: Thi công đường ống hóa chất
CHEMICAL_LINE_INSTALL.label_th: การติดตั้งท่อสารเคมี

baseline.content: 도금액·약액 배관(PFA·PVDF) 융착·체결 — MSDS 확인 및 잔류 약액 배출
baseline.content_en: Plating/process chemical piping (PFA/PVDF) fusion/joining — verify SDS and drain residual chemical
baseline.content_vi: Hàn nhiệt/đấu nối ống hóa chất (PFA/PVDF) — kiểm tra SDS và xả hóa chất dư
baseline.content_th: การเชื่อม/ต่อท่อสารเคมี (PFA/PVDF) — ตรวจสอบ SDS และระบายสารเคมีตกค้าง
baseline.content_id: Penyambungan/fusi pipa kimia (PFA/PVDF) — verifikasi SDS dan kuras kimia sisa

scenarios.content: 기존 라인 잔류 약액(예: 황산·도금 Ni 액)이 fitting 해체 시 분출 → 화상·시력 손상
scenarios.content_en: Residual chemical (e.g. H2SO4/Ni plating bath) spurts on fitting break → burn/eye injury
scenarios.content_vi: Hóa chất dư (H2SO4/dung dịch mạ Ni) bắn khi tháo fitting → bỏng/tổn thương mắt
scenarios.content_th: สารเคมีตกค้าง (H2SO4/น้ำยาชุบ Ni) พุ่งออกตอนถอด fitting → ไหม้/ดวงตาบาดเจ็บ
scenarios.content_id: Kimia sisa (H2SO4/Ni plating) menyembur saat fitting dilepas → luka bakar/cedera mata

mitigations.content: 라인 isolation + DI flushing 3회 + pH 중성 확인 후 해체. 비상 샤워·세안 시설 15m 이내 운용
mitigations.content_en: Line isolation + 3× DI flushing + neutral pH check before disassembly. Emergency shower/eyewash within 15 m
mitigations.content_vi: Cô lập đường ống + xả DI 3 lần + xác nhận pH trung tính trước khi tháo. Vòi tắm/rửa mắt khẩn cấp trong 15 m
mitigations.content_th: แยกท่อ + ล้าง DI 3 ครั้ง + ตรวจ pH เป็นกลางก่อนถอด ฝักบัว/ล้างตาฉุกเฉินภายใน 15 ม.
mitigations.content_id: Isolasi line + DI flushing 3× + verifikasi pH netral sebelum dibongkar. Pancuran/cuci mata darurat dalam 15 m

ppe.content: 화학복(Level B/C, 약액 종별) + 페이스 쉴드 + 내화학 부츠 + 부틸 장갑
ppe.content_en: Chemical suit (Level B/C per chemical) + face shield + chemical boots + butyl gloves
ppe.content_vi: Bộ hóa chất (Level B/C theo hóa chất) + tấm chắn mặt + ủng hóa chất + găng butyl
ppe.content_th: ชุดเคมี (Level B/C ตามสารเคมี) + face shield + รองเท้าบูทเคมี + ถุงมือ butyl
ppe.content_id: Setelan kimia (Level B/C sesuai bahan) + face shield + boot kimia + sarung tangan butyl

baseline.content: 약액 캐비닛(VMB·CDM) 설치 및 누액 받이(secondary containment) 시공 확인
baseline.content_en: Chemical cabinet (VMB/CDM) install and secondary containment confirmed
baseline.content_vi: Lắp tủ hóa chất (VMB/CDM) và kiểm tra containment thứ cấp
baseline.content_th: ติดตั้งตู้สารเคมี (VMB/CDM) และตรวจสอบ containment ทุติยภูมิ
baseline.content_id: Instalasi kabinet kimia (VMB/CDM) dan konfirmasi containment sekunder

scenarios.content: 이중 배관·누액 받이 미시공 상태에서 시운전 → 누액 시 클린룸 바닥 손상 및 fab 전체 영향
scenarios.content_en: Commissioning without double-piping/sump → leak damages cleanroom floor and impacts entire fab
scenarios.content_vi: Vận hành thử khi chưa có ống đôi/khay hứng → rò làm hỏng sàn phòng sạch và ảnh hưởng toàn fab
scenarios.content_th: เริ่มทดสอบโดยยังไม่ติดท่อคู่/ถาดรอง → รั่วทำพื้นคลีนรูมเสียหายและกระทบทั้ง fab
scenarios.content_id: Commissioning tanpa pipa ganda/sump → bocoran merusak lantai cleanroom dan berdampak ke seluruh fab

mitigations.content: 이중 배관(double containment)·sump·누액 검지기 설치 검수, 미시공 시 시운전 금지(turnover gate)
mitigations.content_en: Inspect double containment / sump / leak detector before turnover; no commissioning if missing
mitigations.content_vi: Kiểm tra ống đôi / sump / đầu dò rò trước bàn giao; không vận hành thử nếu thiếu
mitigations.content_th: ตรวจ double containment / sump / leak detector ก่อน turnover ห้ามเริ่มทดสอบหากไม่ครบ
mitigations.content_id: Inspeksi double containment / sump / detektor bocor sebelum turnover; tidak ada commissioning bila kurang

ppe.content_en: Chemical gloves + safety goggles + safety shoes
ppe.content_vi: Găng hóa chất + kính bảo hộ + giày bảo hộ
ppe.content_th: ถุงมือเคมี + แว่นตานิรภัย + รองเท้านิรภัย
ppe.content_id: Sarung tangan kimia + kacamata safety + sepatu safety

baseline.content: 발연성·부식성 약액(HF·H2SO4·HCl) 시운전 — 단계별 농도 상승 및 비상 대응 동선 확인
baseline.content_en: Fuming/corrosive chemical commissioning (HF/H2SO4/HCl) — staged concentration ramp and emergency route check
baseline.content_vi: Vận hành thử hóa chất bốc khói/ăn mòn (HF/H2SO4/HCl) — tăng nồng độ theo bậc và kiểm tra lối thoát khẩn
baseline.content_th: การเริ่มเดินสารเคมีฟูม/กัดกร่อน (HF/H2SO4/HCl) — เพิ่มความเข้มข้นเป็นขั้นและตรวจเส้นทางฉุกเฉิน
baseline.content_id: Commissioning kimia fuming/korosif (HF/H2SO4/HCl) — kenaikan konsentrasi bertahap dan jalur darurat

scenarios.content: HF 시운전 중 누출 → 피부 흡수형 화학화상(지연성·치명적)
scenarios.content_en: HF leak during commissioning → absorbed chemical burn (delayed, lethal)
scenarios.content_vi: Rò HF khi vận hành thử → bỏng hóa chất thấm da (chậm, có thể tử vong)
scenarios.content_th: HF รั่วระหว่างทดสอบ → ไหม้สารเคมีดูดซึมผ่านผิว (ออกฤทธิ์ช้า ถึงตาย)
scenarios.content_id: Bocoran HF saat commissioning → luka bakar kimia terserap kulit (tertunda, fatal)

mitigations.content: HF 전용 칼슘글루코네이트 젤(2.5%) 작업장 배치, 노출 시 즉시 도포 + 응급 후송 SOP. 농도 25%/50%/100% 단계 시운전
mitigations.content_en: Place 2.5% calcium gluconate gel at HF site, apply on exposure + emergency evacuation SOP. Stage commissioning at 25%/50%/100%
mitigations.content_vi: Đặt gel canxi gluconat 2.5% tại hiện trường HF, thoa ngay khi phơi nhiễm + SOP sơ tán. Vận hành thử theo bậc 25%/50%/100%
mitigations.content_th: วางเจล calcium gluconate 2.5% ที่หน้างาน HF ทาทันทีเมื่อโดน + SOP อพยพฉุกเฉิน เริ่มทดสอบเป็นขั้น 25%/50%/100%
mitigations.content_id: Sediakan gel calcium gluconate 2.5% di area HF, oles segera saat terpapar + SOP evakuasi. Commissioning bertahap 25%/50%/100%

ppe.content: 전면 화학복(Level B) + SCBA 또는 강제송기식 마스크 + 부틸·바이톤 장갑
ppe.content_en: Level B chemical suit + SCBA or supplied-air respirator + butyl/Viton gloves
ppe.content_vi: Bộ Level B + SCBA hoặc mặt nạ cấp khí + găng butyl/Viton
ppe.content_th: ชุดเคมี Level B + SCBA หรือหน้ากากจ่ายอากาศ + ถุงมือ butyl/Viton
ppe.content_id: Setelan kimia Level B + SCBA atau respirator suplai udara + sarung tangan butyl/Viton

MEP_HVAC_INSTALL.label_th: การติดตั้ง MEP/HVAC/สาธารณูปโภค

baseline.content: 고압 전기 인입·patch — LOTO(에너지 차단) 및 활선 근접작업 금지
baseline.content_en: HV electrical incoming/patch — LOTO and no live-line work
baseline.content_vi: Đấu nối/đi cao thế — LOTO và cấm làm việc trên dây sống
baseline.content_th: ต่อ/แพตช์ไฟแรงสูงเข้าระบบ — LOTO และห้ามทำงานกับสายมีไฟ
baseline.content_id: Incoming/patch listrik tegangan tinggi — LOTO dan larangan kerja live

scenarios.content: 변전실 LOTO 미적용·다른 작업자 무단 재가압 → 감전·아크 플래시
scenarios.content_en: Missing LOTO at substation or unauthorized re-energize by others → electric shock/arc flash
scenarios.content_vi: Thiếu LOTO trạm biến áp hoặc người khác đóng điện trái phép → điện giật/arc flash
scenarios.content_th: ไม่มี LOTO ที่สถานีไฟฟ้าหรือมีคนจ่ายไฟกลับโดยพลการ → ไฟดูด/arc flash
scenarios.content_id: LOTO substation tidak ada atau orang lain re-energize tanpa izin → tersengat/arc flash

mitigations.content: 다중 자물쇠(group LOTO) 작업자 본인 잠금, 검전기 0V 확인 후 접지, LG이노텍 전기 책임자 입회
mitigations.content_en: Group LOTO with personal locks, verify 0 V with tester then ground, LG Innotek electrical authority witness
mitigations.content_vi: Group LOTO mỗi người khóa riêng, đo 0 V bằng tester rồi tiếp địa, đại diện điện LG Innotek chứng kiến
mitigations.content_th: Group LOTO ล็อกรายบุคคล วัด 0 V ด้วยเทสเตอร์แล้วต่อกราวด์ ผู้รับผิดชอบไฟฟ้า LG Innotek เป็นพยาน
mitigations.content_id: Group LOTO dengan kunci pribadi, verifikasi 0 V dengan tester lalu grounding, otoritas listrik LG Innotek menyaksikan

ppe.content: 절연장갑(Class 2 이상) + 아크 플래시 슈트(Cat. 2) + 안면보호 + 절연안전화
ppe.content_en: Insulated gloves (Class 2+) + arc flash suit (Cat. 2) + face shield + dielectric boots
ppe.content_vi: Găng cách điện (Class 2+) + bộ arc flash (Cat. 2) + chắn mặt + giày cách điện
ppe.content_th: ถุงมือฉนวน (Class 2+) + ชุด arc flash (Cat. 2) + face shield + รองเท้าฉนวน
ppe.content_id: Sarung tangan isolasi (Class 2+) + setelan arc flash (Cat. 2) + face shield + sepatu dielectric

baseline.content: UPW(초순수)·DI·PCW 배관 시공 — 가압 시험 및 누수 시 인접 라인 영향 평가
baseline.content_en: UPW/DI/PCW piping — pressure test and assess impact on adjacent lines if leak
baseline.content_vi: Đường ống UPW/DI/PCW — kiểm tra áp lực và đánh giá ảnh hưởng nếu rò
baseline.content_th: ท่อ UPW/DI/PCW — ทดสอบความดันและประเมินผลต่อไลน์ข้างเคียงหากรั่ว
baseline.content_id: Pipa UPW/DI/PCW — uji tekanan dan nilai dampak ke line berdekatan bila bocor

scenarios.content: 가압 시험 중 fitting 누수가 천정 위 전기 panel에 떨어짐 → 누전
scenarios.content_en: Pressure test leak drips onto overhead electrical panel → short circuit
scenarios.content_vi: Rò khi thử áp nhỏ giọt xuống panel điện trên trần → chập điện
scenarios.content_th: การรั่วระหว่างทดสอบความดันหยดลง panel ไฟฟ้าบนเพดาน → ไฟลัด
scenarios.content_id: Bocoran saat uji tekanan menetes ke panel listrik atas → korsleting

mitigations.content: 시험 전 천정 내 전기·통신 trunk 위치 매핑 + 임시 방수 cover. 누수 시 즉시 차단 SOP
mitigations.content_en: Map overhead electrical/telecom trunks + place temporary drip cover; immediate shutoff SOP on leak
mitigations.content_vi: Lập bản đồ trục điện/viễn thông trên trần + đậy chống nhỏ giọt tạm; SOP cắt ngay khi rò
mitigations.content_th: ทำแผนผัง trunk ไฟฟ้า/สื่อสารบนเพดาน + ครอบกันหยดชั่วคราว ตัดทันที SOP เมื่อรั่ว
mitigations.content_id: Petakan trunk listrik/telekomunikasi atas + pasang penutup tetes sementara; SOP putus segera saat bocor

ppe.content: 보안경 + 안전화 + 절연장갑(인접 전기 작업 시)
ppe.content_en: Safety goggles + safety shoes + insulated gloves (if near electrical)
ppe.content_vi: Kính bảo hộ + giày bảo hộ + găng cách điện (nếu gần điện)
ppe.content_th: แว่นตานิรภัย + รองเท้านิรภัย + ถุงมือฉนวน (เมื่อใกล้ไฟฟ้า)
ppe.content_id: Kacamata safety + sepatu safety + sarung tangan isolasi (bila dekat listrik)

baseline.content: Scrubber·exhaust duct 시공 — 천정 고소작업 및 인접 가동 scrubber와의 격리
baseline.content_en: Scrubber/exhaust duct install — overhead work and isolation from adjacent live scrubber
baseline.content_vi: Lắp scrubber/ống xả — làm việc trên cao và cách ly với scrubber đang chạy lân cận
baseline.content_th: ติดตั้ง scrubber/ท่อ exhaust — งานบนที่สูงและแยกจาก scrubber ที่ทำงานอยู่ข้างเคียง
baseline.content_id: Pemasangan scrubber/duct exhaust — kerja ketinggian dan isolasi dari scrubber aktif berdekatan

scenarios.content: 인접 가동 scrubber 출구 측 작업 중 유해가스(NH3·HF fume) 역류 노출
scenarios.content_en: Reverse-flow exposure to scrubber off-gas (NH3/HF fume) while working at adjacent live exhaust
scenarios.content_vi: Phơi nhiễm khí thải scrubber (NH3/HF fume) do dòng ngược khi làm gần đầu xả đang vận hành
scenarios.content_th: การสัมผัสก๊าซย้อนทาง (NH3/HF fume) ขณะทำงานใกล้ exhaust ที่ทำงานอยู่
scenarios.content_id: Paparan aliran balik gas (NH3/HF fume) saat kerja dekat exhaust scrubber aktif

mitigations.content: 인접 scrubber 정지·blind 격리 또는 작업자 강제송기식 호흡기 착용 + 가스 측정기 휴대
mitigations.content_en: Stop/blind-isolate adjacent scrubber, or use supplied-air respirator + personal gas monitor
mitigations.content_vi: Dừng/blind scrubber lân cận, hoặc dùng mặt nạ cấp khí + máy đo khí cá nhân
mitigations.content_th: หยุด/blind scrubber ข้างเคียง หรือใช้หน้ากากจ่ายอากาศ + เครื่องวัดก๊าซส่วนบุคคล
mitigations.content_id: Hentikan/blind scrubber berdekatan, atau gunakan respirator suplai udara + gas monitor pribadi

ppe.content: 전신 안전대 + 방독마스크(다목적 정화통) + 안전모 + 4가스 검지기(O2/LEL/CO/H2S)
ppe.content_en: Full-body harness + multi-gas respirator + hard hat + 4-gas detector (O2/LEL/CO/H2S)
ppe.content_vi: Dây an toàn toàn thân + mặt nạ phòng độc đa năng + mũ cứng + máy đo 4 khí (O2/LEL/CO/H2S)
ppe.content_th: เข็มขัดนิรภัยเต็มตัว + หน้ากากกันก๊าซ multi-gas + หมวกนิรภัย + เครื่องวัดก๊าซ 4 ชนิด (O2/LEL/CO/H2S)
ppe.content_id: Full body harness + respirator multi-gas + helm safety + detektor 4 gas (O2/LEL/CO/H2S)

FAB_EXTENSION_STRUCTURE.label_vi: Kết cấu và lớp vỏ mở rộng nhà máy
FAB_EXTENSION_STRUCTURE.label_th: โครงสร้างและเปลือกอาคารส่วนต่อขยาย Fab

baseline.content: 굴착·기초 공사 — 흙막이 가시설 및 지하 매설물(가스·전력) 사전 탐사
baseline.content_en: Excavation/foundation — shoring and pre-survey of underground utilities (gas/power)
baseline.content_vi: Đào và móng — chống vách và khảo sát công trình ngầm (khí/điện)
baseline.content_th: งานขุดและฐานราก — shoring และสำรวจสาธารณูปโภคใต้ดิน (ก๊าซ/ไฟฟ้า) ล่วงหน้า
baseline.content_id: Galian/fondasi — shoring dan survei utilitas bawah tanah (gas/listrik)

scenarios.content: 기존 팹의 특수가스 매설 배관 미확인 굴착 → 손상·누출
scenarios.content_en: Excavation without identifying existing fab specialty-gas buried pipe → damage/leak
scenarios.content_vi: Đào không xác định ống khí đặc biệt ngầm của fab cũ → hư hỏng/rò
scenarios.content_th: ขุดโดยไม่ระบุท่อก๊าซพิเศษฝังของ fab เดิม → เสียหาย/รั่ว
scenarios.content_id: Galian tanpa identifikasi pipa gas khusus terkubur fab eksisting → kerusakan/bocor

mitigations.content: GPR(지하탐사) + LG이노텍 FAC as-built 도면 대조 후 굴착 허가서 발급, 수작업 굴착 우선 50cm
mitigations.content_en: GPR + cross-check LG Innotek FAC as-built, issue dig permit, hand-dig first 50 cm
mitigations.content_vi: GPR + đối chiếu as-built LG Innotek FAC, cấp giấy phép đào, đào tay 50 cm đầu
mitigations.content_th: GPR + เทียบ as-built ของ LG Innotek FAC ออกใบอนุญาตขุด ขุดมือ 50 ซม. แรก
mitigations.content_id: GPR + cocokkan as-built FAC LG Innotek, terbitkan dig permit, gali manual 50 cm pertama

ppe.content: 안전모 + 형광조끼 + 안전화 + 4가스 검지기(굴착부 진입 시)
ppe.content_en: Hard hat + hi-vis vest + safety shoes + 4-gas detector (when entering pit)
ppe.content_vi: Mũ cứng + áo phản quang + giày bảo hộ + máy đo 4 khí (khi xuống hố)
ppe.content_th: หมวกนิรภัย + เสื้อสะท้อนแสง + รองเท้านิรภัย + เครื่องวัด 4 ก๊าซ (เมื่อลงหลุม)
ppe.content_id: Helm safety + rompi reflektif + sepatu safety + detektor 4 gas (saat masuk pit)

baseline.content: 철골·데크 조립 — 고소작업 + 양중 동시 작업 시 구역 분리
baseline.content_en: Steel/deck erection — separate zones for working-at-height and lifting concurrent ops
baseline.content_vi: Lắp thép/deck — tách khu vực khi làm trên cao và nâng diễn ra đồng thời
baseline.content_th: ติดตั้งโครงเหล็ก/deck — แยกโซนเมื่อทำงานบนที่สูงและยกพร้อมกัน
baseline.content_id: Erection baja/deck — pisahkan zona saat kerja ketinggian dan pengangkatan bersamaan

scenarios.content: 철골 볼팅 작업자 직하 구역에서 데크 양중 → 추락·낙하물 동시 노출
scenarios.content_en: Deck lift below steel bolting crew → simultaneous fall and falling object exposure
scenarios.content_vi: Nâng deck ngay dưới đội bắt bu lông thép → đồng thời ngã và vật rơi
scenarios.content_th: ยก deck ใต้ทีมขันโบลต์เหล็ก → เสี่ยงตกและของหล่นพร้อมกัน
scenarios.content_id: Pengangkatan deck di bawah crew bolting baja → paparan jatuh dan benda jatuh bersamaan

mitigations.content: 양중 시간대 별도 지정(작업 분리), 안전대 이중고리 + 추락방지망 + 낙하물 방지망 동시 설치, 신호수 + safety supervisor 상주
mitigations.content_en: Dedicated lift windows separate from work-at-height, double-hook harness + fall net + debris net, signaler + safety supervisor on site
mitigations.content_vi: Khung giờ nâng riêng, dây an toàn móc đôi + lưới chống ngã + lưới chống vật rơi, có người ra hiệu + giám sát an toàn
mitigations.content_th: กำหนดช่วงเวลายกแยก สายเข็มขัดสองตะขอ + ตาข่ายกันตก + ตาข่ายกันของหล่น มีผู้ให้สัญญาณ + safety supervisor
mitigations.content_id: Slot waktu pengangkatan terpisah, harness dua hook + jaring jatuh + jaring debris, signalman + safety supervisor di lokasi

ppe.content_en: Hard hat (chin strap) + full-body harness (double lanyard) + steel-toe boots + hi-vis vest
ppe.content_vi: Mũ cứng (quai cằm) + dây an toàn toàn thân (móc đôi) + giày mũi thép + áo phản quang
ppe.content_th: หมวกนิรภัย (สายรัดคาง) + เข็มขัดนิรภัยเต็มตัว (lanyard คู่) + รองเท้าหัวเหล็ก + เสื้อสะท้อนแสง
ppe.content_id: Helm safety (tali dagu) + full body harness (lanyard ganda) + sepatu ujung baja + rompi reflektif

baseline.content: 외장 panel·창호 시공 — 풍속·강우 게이트 및 인접 가동 fab 외벽 보호
baseline.content_en: External panel/glazing — wind/rain stoppage gate and protection of adjacent live fab envelope
baseline.content_vi: Lắp panel ngoài/cửa kính — cổng dừng theo gió/mưa và bảo vệ vỏ fab đang vận hành lân cận
baseline.content_th: ติดตั้ง panel ภายนอก/กระจก — gate หยุดงานตามลม/ฝน และป้องกันเปลือก fab ที่ทำงานอยู่ข้างเคียง
baseline.content_id: Pemasangan panel luar/kaca — gate berhenti karena angin/hujan dan proteksi envelope fab aktif berdekatan

scenarios.content: 풍속 10m/s 초과 시 panel 비산 → 인접 가동 fab 외벽 파손 → 양산 라인 양압 손실
scenarios.content_en: Panel flies in wind >10m/s → damage to adjacent live fab envelope → positive-pressure loss in production line
scenarios.content_vi: Panel bay khi gió >10m/s → vỏ fab đang chạy lân cận hư → mất áp suất dương dây chuyền
scenarios.content_th: panel ปลิวเมื่อลม >10m/s → ทำเปลือก fab ที่ทำงานอยู่ข้างเคียงเสียหาย → สูญเสียแรงดันบวกในไลน์ผลิต
scenarios.content_id: Panel terbang saat angin >10m/s → kerusakan envelope fab aktif → kehilangan tekanan positif line produksi

mitigations.content: 풍속계 상주 측정 — 8m/s 경고·10m/s 외장 작업 즉시 중단, 강풍 시 자재 결박 표준 + LG이노텍 EHS와 합동 weather hold 결정
mitigations.content_en: On-site anemometer — alert at 8 m/s, stop external work at 10 m/s, secure materials, joint weather-hold decision with LG Innotek EHS
mitigations.content_vi: Có máy đo gió tại chỗ — báo động 8m/s, ngừng việc ngoài 10m/s, neo vật tư, quyết định weather-hold cùng LG Innotek EHS
mitigations.content_th: มี anemometer ประจำ — เตือนที่ 8m/s หยุดงานภายนอกที่ 10m/s ผูกรัดวัสดุ ตัดสินใจ weather-hold ร่วมกับ LG Innotek EHS
mitigations.content_id: Anemometer di lokasi — peringatan 8m/s, hentikan kerja luar 10m/s, ikat material, keputusan weather-hold bersama EHS LG Innotek

ppe.content: 안전모(턱끈) + 전신 안전대 + 안전화 + 작업복(방한 또는 통풍)
ppe.content_en: Hard hat (chin strap) + full-body harness + safety shoes + weather-appropriate coverall
ppe.content_vi: Mũ cứng (quai cằm) + dây an toàn toàn thân + giày bảo hộ + áo liền quần theo thời tiết
ppe.content_th: หมวกนิรภัย (สายรัดคาง) + เข็มขัดนิรภัยเต็มตัว + รองเท้านิรภัย + ชุดทำงานตามสภาพอากาศ
ppe.content_id: Helm safety (tali dagu) + full body harness + sepatu safety + coverall sesuai cuaca
